sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_test (id Int32, xml_col String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) FROM xml_test WHERE decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) = 'foo&bar';
SELECT id, decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) AS decoded_xml FROM xml_test WHERE decoded_xml IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) = decodeXMLComponent('>foo & bar<');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_test WHERE decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) = '';
WITH (SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1) AS subquery SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_col = subquery;
CREATE TABLE derived_table AS SELECT id, decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) AS decoded_xml FROM xml_test;
SELECT decoded_xml FROM derived_table WHERE decoded_xml = 'baz' OR decoded_xml = ''baz'';
SELECT a.id FROM xml_test AS a JOIN xml_test AS b ON decodeXMLComponent(a.xml_col) = decodeXMLComponent(b.xml_col) WHERE NOT a.id = b.id;
SELECT id FROM xml_test GROUP BY decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_xml AS SELECT id, decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) FROM xml_test;
SELECT decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) FROM temp_xml WHERE decodeXMLComponent(xml_col) = decodeXMLComponent('<foo & bar>');
